title: Disclaimer

general.title: General Information
general.content: The information provided by WinGlows ("we," "us," or "our") on our website and through our products is for general informational purposes only. All information is provided in good faith, however, we make no representation or warranty of any kind, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability, or completeness of any information.

noGuarantee.title: No Guaranteed Results
noGuarantee.content: While we strive to provide accurate and useful information about productivity and digital tools:
items: Results from using our products may vary based on individual circumstances
Productivity gains mentioned in marketing materials are examples and not guaranteed outcomes
Time-saving estimates are based on average user experiences and may differ for each user
Success stories and testimonials represent individual experiences and not typical results

technical.title: Technical Limitations
items: Software may contain bugs or technical limitations despite thorough testing
Compatibility with third-party services depends on their respective APIs and may change
Performance may vary based on hardware, internet connection, and system configuration
Updates to Obsidian or browsers may temporarily affect plugin functionality

professional.title: Professional Advice
professional.content: Our products and services do not constitute professional advice. Users should:
items: Not rely solely on our tools for critical business or personal decisions
Seek appropriate professional advice for specific situations
Use their own judgment when implementing productivity strategies
Verify any information or suggestions provided through our services

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Content
items: We are not responsible for third-party content accessed through our tools
Links to external websites are provided for convenience only
We do not endorse or verify third-party content
Users access external content at their own risk

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Under no circumstances shall WinGlows be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or exemplary damages arising from:
items: Use or inability to use our products
Data loss or business interruption
Errors or omissions in our content
Security breaches or technical issues
Any other matter relating to our services

changes.title: Changes and Errors
items: Modify or discontinue any part of our services without notice
Correct any errors or omissions in any content
Change the terms of service at any time

contact: For any questions about this disclaimer, please contact legal@winglowz.com
